settings.hero_a_h1: Premium Pet Lifestyle for Pets With
settings.lead: Our journey begins with premium cat litter — and continues with thoughtfully selected essentials made for pets who deserve more.
settings.hero_b_lead: A natural mineral litter engineered to clump fast, lock odour, and keep the air clear — wrapped in warm vanilla.
settings.hero_c_lead: From ultra-clumping vanilla litter to slow-cooked cuisine — a considered collection for the pets who run the household.

settings.heading: The litter everyone keeps re-ordering.
settings.description: Natural mineral granules clump on contact and trap odour for days — with 99.9% less dust for clearer air and tidier floors. The vanilla finish is subtle, never synthetic.

settings.heading: Shop by companion
settings.subheading: Considered essentials for every member of the household.

settings.quote_text: Premium pet lifestyle for pets with
settings.paragraph1: Biscuit began with a simple conviction: the everyday objects of pet care — the litter, the bowl, the bed — deserve the same craft we give our own homes. So we obsess over mineral sourcing, scent balance, and foil-stamped detail, then hold every batch to one test.
settings.paragraph2: If it isn't Biscuit Approved, it doesn't ship.
